queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Vernier Spectral Analysis' AND publisher = 'Vernier Software & Technology';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Vernier Spectral Analysis' AND publisher = 'Vernier Software & Technology' AND version_compare(version, '5.1.0-2993') < 0);
